decision: Multi-tenancy via org_id on every table
reason: Platform licenses to multiple peptide businesses. org_id scoping + RLS enforces isolation without separate databases.

decision: Commission calculation via DB trigger on orders
reason: Guarantees commissions are created for every order regardless of code path. Walks upline_id chain automatically.

decision: verify_jwt = false on all edge functions
reason: Gateway JWT check causes race conditions during token refresh. Auth handled in code via _shared/auth.ts gives more control.

decision: 5 user roles (admin/staff/sales_rep/customer/vendor)
reason: Vendor (super-admin) manages all tenants. Admin manages their own org. Sales_rep has scoped partner access. Customer is client portal.

decision: Self-healing system (sentinel-worker + meta-sentinel)
reason: Zero-human-in-the-loop error detection and repair. 16-phase pipeline handles everything from browser errors to schema DDL fixes.

decision: Client-side self-healing via auto-error-reporter.ts
reason: Browser checks client_heal_instructions before reporting errors. Reduces noise and fixes common issues (re_auth, reload, suppress) without server round-trip.

decision: WooCommerce as primary e-commerce integration
reason: Most peptide businesses already use WordPress/WooCommerce. OAuth connect + bidirectional sync for products and customers.

decision: Composio for Shopify OAuth instead of native
reason: Shopify app review process takes weeks. Composio provides instant OAuth without app listing.

decision: React + Vite + HashRouter (not Next.js)
reason: Started as Lovable/Bolt.new generated app. HashRouter avoids server-side routing complexity for SPA. Migrating to Next.js would break 97 page files.

decision: Edge functions for all server logic (no API routes for core features)
reason: Supabase edge functions deploy independently, run close to DB, and share _shared/ utilities. Vercel API routes only used for Stripe/shipping webhooks.

decision: Agent API (Python FastAPI) for merchant onboarding AI
reason: Complex multi-turn AI conversation with tool use needed more flexibility than edge functions provide. Deployed separately on Docker.

decision: Code-patcher limited to src/ files only
reason: Safety: auto-generated code changes should never touch infrastructure (supabase/, .github/, config). Max 500 lines, 3 files, 5 patches/day.

decision: Built USDC Payment Pool module as optional premium feature. Pool is NOT required for basic NMI card processing. Pool adds instant settlement and bank-freeze protection. Full docs at specs/payment-pool.md. Code complete but needs NMI sandbox E2E test before production use.
reason: Peptide merchants get dropped by Stripe/PayPal. NMI accepts them but banks can still freeze funds. Pool puts working capital on-chain where no bank can touch it.

decision: Add /r/:slug route for short referral URLs with self-reference guard in link_referral RPC
reason: ReferralLinkCard generated /r/{slug} and /r/{slug}?p URLs but no route existed. Partner signups defaulted to customer role. Also, clicking own referral link caused parent_rep_id self-reference making partner invisible in hierarchy.

decision: Crypto wallet payments via JSONB array on tenant_config
reason: Orgs need flexible crypto support — multiple wallets with different token/chain combos. JSONB array allows unlimited wallets per org without schema changes per token type.

decision: SMS notifications use short alert message only
reason: TextBelt API key was getting blocked due to long SMS messages with full order details. Switched to simple alert: brand + customer + check dashboard. Order details are on the dashboard.

decision: Block sales_rep from admin order pages + add org_id/rep_id defense-in-depth to order queries
reason: Partner user could see all orders in org by navigating to /sales. RLS only checked org_id, not role. Frontend queries lacked org_id filter.

decision: Client-side only impersonation via sessionStorage + React context
reason: No edge function changes needed — all 51 edge functions validate JWT from auth token, never from request body. Switching context in React is safe and immediate.
alternatives_considered: Read-only shadow session (less useful for debugging)

decision: Replaced client-side context impersonation with true JWT-level session swap via admin-impersonate edge function
reason: Client-side-only approach broke edge function calls and RLS — they always see the admin's real JWT, not the impersonated user. True session swap means the entire Supabase client (JWT, RLS, hooks) sees the target user automatically. No per-hook effectiveUserId patches needed.
alternatives_considered: Keep client-side context (hooks worked but edge functions and RLS were wrong)
Proxy layer that rewrites Authorization header (too complex, breaks streaming)
Read-only mirror with duplicated data fetches (double the queries, inconsistent)

decision: localStorage for admin session backup instead of sessionStorage
reason: sessionStorage is tab-local and is cleared on hard reload. Since exit impersonation requires window.location.href (hard reload), sessionStorage would lose the backup mid-exit. localStorage persists across the reload so the admin session can be restored after the page re-mounts.
alternatives_considered: sessionStorage (data lost on hard reload — would orphan admin)
Cookie (requires server to set/clear, adds round-trip)

decision: Hard reload (window.location.href) on impersonation exit instead of React Router navigate()
reason: React Router navigate() keeps the current component tree in memory. RoleBasedRedirect and other role-aware components read stale context for one render cycle after session is restored, causing a flash redirect to the wrong route. Hard reload guarantees a clean slate — fresh React tree, fresh context, fresh TanStack Query cache.
alternatives_considered: Flush queryClient + force context re-render — too many moving parts, same race risk

decision: Add trigger + backfill for peptides.avg_cost from lots, fix create_validated_order RPC to fallback to lots query
reason: peptides.avg_cost was NULL for all 145 peptides. RPC used it for partner pricing, fell back to retail_price (MSRP) when 0. Frontend queried lots directly (correct) but RPC did not. Now both use avg_cost with lots fallback.

decision: Renamed all '2x cost' labels to 'Partner Price' across entire system
reason: Partners should not know the underlying cost formula. Only senior partners and admins see cost details. 'Partner Price' is generic and doesn't reveal the multiplier. Changed 13 files across partner-facing UI, admin UI, landing page, and order pages.

decision: Navigate directly after linkReferral success instead of waiting for profile state
reason: Race condition: onAuthStateChange deferred fetchUserData overwrites refreshProfile data with stale profile (no org_id), causing infinite spinner on referral signup
